summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Telegram integration features. Backend APIs fully functional (34/34 tests passed, +6 new Telegram-specific tests). Frontend Settings tab displays all required Telegram components correctly. All tabs navigate properly, confirming Positions tab crash fix. Telegram bot integration working as expected (shows 'Not Connected' when no real token configured).
passed_tests: POST /api/settings saves telegram config and returns telegram_running status - ✅
POST /api/settings/telegram/test returns 400 when bot not connected - ✅
Frontend Settings tab loads and shows Telegram Integration section - ✅
Frontend Settings tab shows 'Not Connected' status pill when no valid token - ✅
Frontend shows Bot Token input field with correct placeholder - ✅
Frontend shows Chat ID input with add button functionality - ✅
Frontend shows Automatic Alerts info section mentioning restart and offline - ✅
Frontend shows all 11 Telegram commands in grid (/pause, /resume, /start, /stop, /status, /portfolio, /new, /cancel, /cancelall, /history, /help) - ✅
Frontend Save & Connect button calls POST /api/settings - ✅
Frontend Send Test Alert button is disabled when not connected - ✅
Frontend Positions tab renders without crashing (regression test) - ✅
All other tabs still work (Watchlist, History, Logs) - ✅
All previously passing backend tests still pass (28/28 from iteration 1) - ✅
